src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster version.
Reformat the annotation interface definition to use a single-line brace style.
Exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with Spring Boot 3.x package structure and security defaults.
Update Liquibase properties import to the new Spring Boot 3.x autoconfigure package path.
Rename logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Disable Spring Boot DevTools restart via system property to prevent conflicts with Hazelcast initialization.
Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables where the type is obvious.
Extract application name into a local variable to improve readability and avoid repeated property lookups.
Reformat the multi-line log message string to use proper indentation within the text block.
Realign string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut annotations for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed indentation of '|| within(...)' lines in @Pointcut annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Realign method call arguments in logging statements for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Reformatted logger.error() calls to align arguments vertically.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace ternary null check with String.valueOf to handle potential null cause safely and concisely.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Logger log = logger(joinPoint);' to 'var log = logger(joinPoint);'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested configuration class to manage Liquibase-specific properties within the application properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field and public static class Liquibase with asyncStart property.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming convention.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'private final Logger log' to 'private static final Logger LOG'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference to reduce verbosity.
Replace deprecated single marker access with marker list iteration to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Remove unused GitProperties and BuildProperties fields and their associated setter injection methods.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed private fields gitProperties and buildProperties and their @Autowired setter methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the KeyGenerator bean definition that relied on the removed properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed the keyGenerator() method returning PrefixedKeyGenerator.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove imports for classes that are no longer used in the file.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for Autowired, BuildProperties, GitProperties, KeyGenerator, and PrefixedKeyGenerator.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Modernize logging by using a static final logger instance instead of an instance field.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed private final Logger log to private static final Logger LOG and updated usages.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace wildcard context annotation imports with specific imports for cleaner code.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced import org.springframework.context.annotation.* with specific Bean and Configuration imports.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Enable configuration properties for H2 console to support modern Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Add conditional property check to ensure H2 TCP server bean is only created when explicitly enabled.
Refactor logger instance to use static final constant following modern Java logging conventions.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference, a feature available since Java 10.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from Jackson configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of Hibernate5JakartaModule and deleted the hibernate5Module() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace instance logger field with static final logger constant following modern Java logging conventions.
Introduce configuration-driven logic to choose between synchronous and asynchronous Liquibase initialization.
Convert List-based contexts to comma-delimited string to match updated SpringLiquibase API requirements.
Convert List-based label filters to comma-delimited string to match updated SpringLiquibase API requirements.
Replace deprecated acceptsProfiles with matchesProfiles for environment profile checking.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson provider used in the target framework version.
Change the thrown exception type from JsonProcessingException to JacksonException to match the new Jackson API.
Replace explicit String type with var for the customFields variable to modernize code style.
